---
title: "EMCON SURVEY 0001 — Fixture Mission"
subtitle: "DTG 121200ZAPR26"
format:
  argos-reports-html:
    output-file: emcon-fixture.html
---

## BLUF

::: {.bluf}
Fixture render. 2 new signatures, 1 critical power-up.
:::

## Headline Metrics

<div class="metrics-grid">
<div class="metric-cell"><span class="label">NEW</span><span class="value">2</span></div>
<div class="metric-cell"><span class="label">MISSING</span><span class="value">0</span></div>
<div class="metric-cell"><span class="label">CRITICAL</span><span class="value">1</span></div>
</div>

## New Emitters

| # | FREQ MHZ | PWR DBM | IDENTIFIER | MGRS |
|---|----------|---------|------------|------|
| 1 | 462.675 | -52.3 | NEW-1 | 33UVT1234 |
| 2 | 156.800 | -71.2 | NEW-2 | 33UVT1235 |
